name: Hot Five Bean Salas
recipeIngredient: 1 can (16 oz.) kidney beans, rinsed and drained
1 can (15 oz.) lima beans, rinsed and drained
1 can (15 oz.) garbanzo beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, cook bacon until crisp; reserve 1/4 cup drippings.
2. Set the bacon aside.
3. Add sugar, cornstarch, salt and pepper to the reserved drippings.
4. Stir in vinegar and water; bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
5. Cook and stir for 2 minutes.
6. Add the beans; reduce heat.
7. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes or until beans are heated through.
8. Place in a serving bowl; top with bacon.
Yield: 10-12 servings.
